steps.title: Identify the singular antecedent
steps.content: The blank needs a pronoun referring to "Marcel Duchamp's abstract cubist aesthetic" — a singular noun phrase.

steps.title: Choose the singular pronoun
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: pronoun-antecedent agreement. Rule: a pronoun must match its antecedent in number; the antecedent here is the singular noun phrase "Marcel Duchamp's abstract cubist aesthetic."
  • Choice A — these: plural demonstrative pronoun; does not agree with the singular antecedent. ✗
  • Choice B — it: singular pronoun; correctly refers to the singular noun phrase. ✓
  • Choice C — we: first-person plural; no referent in the passage for "we." ✗
  • Choice D — they: third-person plural; does not agree with the singular antecedent. ✗
That matches Choice B — it.
